title: HDFC Bank Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Bank Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the HDFC Bank Global Group family as a Credit Analyst in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HDFC Bank Global Group:
HDFC Bank Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank Global Group!
